original_image_tags: A typewritten document on aged paper with two punch holes at the top center. The text consists of three paragraphs describing an observation in Golden Gate Park and a subsequent note evaluating the reliability of the account. The page number "1" is visible in the bottom left corner. There is a partial black vertical line or artifact in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed narrative text describing an observer's experience in Golden Gate Park, including a 'NOTE' at the end. Two dark circular hole punches are visible at the top.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text and two hole punches at the top, with no images, photographs, or diagrams present.
